task_completion.description: Stellarium is configured with the correct location and date/time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom status bar of the Stellarium window should display the location as 'Mount John Observatory' (or coordinates near 43°59' S, 170°27' E) and the date/time as '2024-04-15 10:00:00'.

task_completion.description: The required display settings (atmosphere off, equatorial grid, constellation lines and names on) are applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view shows a grid of lines (Equatorial Grid), lines connecting stars (Constellation Lines), and text labels for constellations (Constellation Names). The sky background should be dark, indicating the atmosphere is disabled.

task_completion.description: A view centered on or showing Sigma Octantis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium is navigated to show the star 'Sigma Octantis' (or Polaris Australis), which should be visible, selected, or centered on the screen.

task_completion.description: A view centered on or showing the Crux constellation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium is navigated to show the constellation 'Crux' (Southern Cross), which should be visible, selected, or centered on the screen.

task_completion.description: The reference document is created with the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window or terminal output is visible showing a file named 'scp_alignment_notes.txt' containing the words 'Mount John' (or 'john'), 'April', 'Sigma Octantis', and 'Crux'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Stellarium application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Stellarium GUI running on the desktop, not images of Stellarium viewed in a web browser or image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent captured the required screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Screenshot saved' notification in Stellarium, or the agent opening the file manager/image viewer to verify the captured images in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.

integrity.description: The agent verified the reference document contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reference document contents should be visible on screen (e.g., in a text editor like Mousepad/Gedit or via a terminal command like 'cat'), rather than just blindly running a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Mount John Observatory (-43.986° S, 170.465° E). Target Date/Time: 2024-04-15 10:00:00 UTC. Required Display Flags: Atmosphere disabled, Equatorial Grid enabled, Constellation Lines enabled, Constellation Names enabled. Required Notes File: /home/ga/Desktop/scp_alignment_notes.txt containing keywords 'john', 'april', 'sigma octantis', and 'crux'.
